purchase_invoice.title: Received invoices
purchase_invoice.subtitle: Vendor documents — company expenses.

fields.vendor_invoice_number_hint: As written on the original (e.g. FA-2026-001)
fields.varsymbol_hint: Optional — auto-generated as PF-YYYYMM-NNNN on receipt
fields.currency_add_hint: Add a currency for received invoices (created as inactive for issued)
fields.currency_add_iso_hint: ISO 4217 code (3 letters), e.g. USD, GBP, CHF
fields.currency_add_inactive_note: Created as inactive (purchases only). If you want to issue invoices in it, activate it later in Settings and add a bank account.
fields.currency_add_advanced_hint: To activate (bank account, rate, decimals), go to
fields.currency_inactive_hint: This currency is inactive for issued invoices (no bank account). Only usable for received invoice tracking.

items.title: Items
items.empty: No items — add at least one to calculate totals.

totals.rounding_hint: Difference between items sum and rounded amount on the invoice (typically +/− 0.5 CZK).

payment_currency.toggle: Paying in different currency than invoice
payment_currency.hint: Fill in if paying USD invoice from CZK/EUR account. Diff is used for FX gain/loss tracking.

actions.mark_booked_hint: Internal flag — you mark that the invoice is already booked in your accounting system (Pohoda, Money, external accountant). VAT/KH/SH reports do NOT respect this status (they include 'received' too).

confirm.force_delete_warning: ⚠️ Warning! Really delete a NON-DRAFT invoice? This invoice is no longer a draft — it has 'received' or 'booked' status. Deletion is irreversible and may affect VAT reports.
confirm.force_delete_confirm: Second confirmation: delete invoice with archived PDF? Action is permanent.
confirm.delete_blocked: Only drafts can be deleted. For already received use Cancel.
confirm.cancel: Really cancel this invoice? This cannot be undone.

transition.invalid: Cannot transition to requested state from current.

pdf.title: Vendor original PDF
pdf.dropzone_hint: Drag a PDF here (or click to pick)
pdf.delete_confirm: Really delete the archived PDF? The invoice stays — only the attachment will be removed. This cannot be undone.
pdf.pending_upload: {name} will be uploaded after saving the invoice
pdf.no_pdf: No archived PDF for this invoice.
pdf.invalid_pdf: File is not a valid PDF document.
pdf.duplicate: The same PDF is already archived under another invoice.

extraction.isdoc_found: ISDOC detected in PDF. Fields prefilled from attachment.
extraction.ai_pending: This PDF has no ISDOC. Fill manually, or use AI extraction in External integrations → AI.

scan_inbox.title: Scan received invoices inbox
scan_inbox.no_dir: Inbox directory not configured in cfg.php (purchase_invoice.inbox_dir).

export.page_subtitle: Download received invoices for a month in different formats for accountants.
export.title: Download ZIP with vendor PDFs for the month
export.hint: Exports a ZIP with original vendor PDFs for the selected month. Invoices without archived PDF are skipped.
export.pdf_priority_hint: ZIP contains archived original PDFs from vendors. Invoices without archived PDF are skipped (warning in X-Export-Warnings response header). For invoices without original you can generate our own PDF reconstruction in detail view (Exports → Our PDF).
export.bulk_isdoc_hint: ZIP with one ISDOC 6.0 XML file per received invoice for the chosen month. Role inversion: vendor = supplier, customer = our company.
export.bulk_pohoda_hint: One Pohoda XML dataPack with <dataPackItem> per invoice for the chosen month. Open in Pohoda → File → Data communication → XML import.

validation.invalid_currency_iso: Enter valid ISO 4217 code (3 letters: USD, GBP, …)

classification.title: Classification
classification.vat_classification_hint: If unset, system auto-assigns code by VAT rate (21%→40, 12%→41, 0%→42, reverse→5).

purchase_invoice.force_edit_hint: Admin only — edit received/booked invoice. Totals will be recomputed.

bulk.confirm_cancel: Cancel {n} invoices? This cannot be undone.

vendor.title: Vendors
vendor.search_placeholder: Search vendor by name / Reg. ID…

recurring.title: Recurring invoices
recurring.subtitle: Templates for automatic invoice generation on a schedule.
recurring.name: Name
recurring.name_required: Give the template a name for easier orientation.
recurring.day_of_month_hint: 1–28 (safe for February). For the last day of month, check „End of month" below.
recurring.end_of_month: End of month (28/29/30/31 depending on month)
recurring.end_date_hint: After this date the template is paused automatically (status „Expired").
recurring.tax_date_mode_hint: For VAT payers. If you bill for services delivered in the previous month, choose „Last day of previous month" — both DUZP and the month in item descriptions follow that period.
recurring.increment_month: Sync month in item descriptions to DUZP (e.g. „Hosting 03/2026" → „Hosting 05/2026" if DUZP falls in 5/2026)
recurring.auto_issue: Issue immediately after generating (assign invoice number)
recurring.auto_send_email: Send to client by email after issuing
recurring.items_required: Template must have at least one item.
recurring.pause_confirm: Pause template „{name}"? Cron will skip it until you resume.
recurring.run_now_future_warning: Selected date is in the future. For tax purposes the issue date should reflect actual issuance — consider whether you really want this.
recurring.delete_confirm:
Delete template „{name}"?

Invoices generated so far stay — they just lose the link to the template.

api_tokens.title: API tokens
api_tokens.subtitle: Personal Access Tokens for automation and integrations (Make, Zapier, custom scripts).
api_tokens.intro: Tokens let you call MyInvoice.cz REST API without a browser. Endpoint reference:
api_tokens.empty: You haven't created any API tokens yet.
api_tokens.name_required: Give the token a name so you remember what it's for.
api_tokens.totp_hint: Enter the current code from your authenticator app (step-up security).
api_tokens.supplier_all: All suppliers (token switches via X-Supplier-Id header)
api_tokens.supplier_hint: A token bound to a specific supplier can't access data from other companies. Recommended.
api_tokens.scope_read_desc: Read-only (GET). Good for reporting, BI exports.
api_tokens.scope_read_write_desc: Full API — create invoices, clients, issue documents.
api_tokens.confirm_revoke: Really revoke the token "{name}"? Clients using it will stop working.
api_tokens.created_warning: The plain-text token is shown only once. Save it to a password manager — you won't see it again.
api_tokens.created_confirm: I've saved the token safely and understand I won't see it again.

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Check available MyInvoice.cz versions and upgrade
updates.no_check_yet: No check has been performed yet
updates.queued_desc: Host-side watcher (cmd/docker-update-watcher.(sh/ps1)) will apply it. If the watcher is not running, run cmd/docker-update.(sh/ps1) manually on the host.
updates.in_progress_desc: Flag file exists, the host-side watcher is processing it. The result will appear here when finished.
updates.no_admin: Updates are available to administrators only.
updates.warning_secret_key_text: Set `cfg.app.secret_encryption_key` to a 32B base64 value to avoid TOTP setup failures due to misconfiguration.
updates.how_docker_desc: Clicking 'Update' writes a flag file `storage/upgrade-requested.json`. A host-side watcher (`cmd/docker-update-watcher.(sh/ps1)` as systemd unit / Scheduled Task) picks it up and runs `cmd/docker-update.(sh/ps1)` — pulling the new image, restarting the stack, running migrations. The result and log appear on this page.
updates.how_docker_setup: If the watcher is not yet installed, follow § 19.4 of the manual (systemd unit on Linux, Scheduled Task on Windows). Without the watcher, run on the host manually after clicking 'Update':
updates.how_native_desc: For native deployments (shared hosting / VPS without Docker) the UI in this version does not download the tarball automatically — instead it shows exact copy-paste commands after you click 'Update'. Requires PHP CLI + Composer + Node + pnpm on the host. If those are unavailable, use the production bundle from the release page (full deployable tar.gz):

auth.reset_sent: If the email exists, we sent you a reset link.
auth.min_chars: Password must be at least {n} characters
auth.totp_hint: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password) and enter the 6-digit code.
auth.totp_setup_step1: 1. Scan the QR code in your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, Bitwarden, Microsoft Authenticator).
auth.totp_setup_step2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code from the app to activate.
auth.totp_enabled_done: TOTP activated. You'll be prompted for a code on next login.
auth.totp_disable_hint: To disable, contact an admin (reset CLI: php api/bin/reset-2fa.php <email>).
auth.totp_force_intro: The administrator requires 2FA for all users. Without an active TOTP you cannot continue. Scan the QR code in your authenticator app and confirm with the 6-digit code.
auth.totp_force_logout_hint: If you don't have your authenticator handy, you can sign out:
auth.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.

approval_inbox.title: Approvals inbox
approval_inbox.subtitle: Global view of invoices where the customer is approving the work report.
approval_inbox.overdue_only: Only after 5 days with no response

invoice.title: Invoices
invoice.varsymbol_hint: Optional manual override. Empty → generated on Issue per Supplier settings → Invoice numbering.
invoice.negative_item_hint: Enter a discount as a negative quantity or a negative unit price. The final amount due must stay positive.
invoice.amount_positive_required: Amount due must be greater than 0. Use a credit note for a zero or negative document.
invoice.varsymbol_no_template: No format set — go to Settings → Invoice numbering, or fill in manually.
invoice.delete_issued_confirm_cn:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting ISSUED credit note {varsymbol}

A credit note is a valid accounting record — has a generated number and may be in your accountant's books.

What happens:
• Credit note is permanently removed from the database
• Cached PDF is deleted from disk
• Any linked cancellation document is deleted TOO
• Number {varsymbol} becomes available for reuse
• The original invoice is NOT affected — it stays in its current status (typically cancelled)
• Action is audited (invoice.force_deleted)

Continue?
invoice.delete_sent_confirm_cn:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting SENT credit note {varsymbol}

This credit note was already emailed to the client. Deleting will cause a mismatch between your records and what the client has.

What happens:
• Credit note is permanently removed from the database (incl. archived sent PDF)
• Any linked cancellation document is deleted TOO
• Number {varsymbol} becomes available for reuse
• The original invoice stays unchanged
• Action is audited

Really continue?
invoice.delete_cancelled_confirm_cn:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting CANCELLED credit note {varsymbol}

Deletes both the credit note AND the linked cancellation document — both go in cascade.

What happens:
• Both credit note {varsymbol} AND its cancellation document are removed
• Their numbers become available
• The original invoice stays unchanged
• Action is audited

This is irreversible. Continue?
invoice.delete_issued_confirm:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting ISSUED invoice {varsymbol}

This is a valid accounting record — has a generated invoice number, supplier and client snapshots, and may already be in your accountant's books.

What happens:
• Invoice is permanently removed from the database
• Cached PDF is deleted from disk
• Any linked cancellation/credit-note is deleted TOO
• If matched to a bank transaction, the transaction stays but loses its pair
• Invoice number {varsymbol} becomes available for reuse
• Action is audited (invoice.force_deleted)

Recommended: issue a CANCELLATION or CREDIT NOTE instead of deleting. Continue?
invoice.delete_sent_confirm:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting SENT invoice {varsymbol}

This invoice was already emailed to the client. They have it in their inbox / may have it in their accounting. Deleting will cause a mismatch between your records and what the client has.

What happens:
• Invoice is permanently removed from the database (incl. archived sent PDF)
• Any linked cancellation/credit-note is deleted TOO
• Invoice number {varsymbol} becomes available for reuse
• Action is audited

Recommended: issue a CANCELLATION or CREDIT NOTE and explain to the client. Really continue?
invoice.delete_paid_confirm:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting PAID invoice {varsymbol}

This invoice is issued, sent, paid by the client, and the money is in your bank account. You're deleting an accounting record that corresponds to a real payment.

What happens:
• Invoice is permanently removed from the database
• If matched to a bank transaction, the transaction stays but loses its pair (find it again in unmatched)
• Any linked cancellation/credit-note is deleted TOO
• Revenue / KPIs on dashboard and client/project pages are recomputed
• Action is audited

Recommended: if accidentally marked paid, use Unpay (admin). If returning money, issue a CREDIT NOTE. Really delete?
invoice.delete_cancelled_confirm:
⚠️ WARNING — deleting CANCELLED invoice {varsymbol}

Deletes both the original invoice AND the linked cancellation document — both go in cascade.

What happens:
• Both invoice {varsymbol} AND its cancellation document are removed
• Their numbers become available
• If paid, bank transaction loses its pair
• Action is audited

This is irreversible. Continue?
invoice.delete_force_title: Force-delete: removes the accounting document with all linked cancellations/credit notes
invoice.issue_confirm: Issue invoice? Once issued it cannot be edited.
invoice.issue_no_items: Invoice must contain at least one item.
invoice.unmark_paid_confirm: Revert invoice {varsymbol} from paid back to issued? The payment date will be cleared.
invoice.unmark_paid_done: Invoice reverted from paid back to its previous state.
invoice.clone_increment_confirm:
Shift months in descriptions by +1?

OK = shift (e.g. "3/2026" → "4/2026")
Cancel = keep original descriptions
invoice.send_test_reminder_done: Test reminder sent ({days} days overdue) to {recipients}
invoice.reminder_confirm: Send reminder to client? Invoice is {days} days overdue.
invoice.bulk_reminder_no_eligible: None of the selected invoices is overdue.

actions.proforma_final_issued: Final tax document issued from proforma

approval.request_confirm: Send the work report to the customer for approval? A one-time link will be generated.
approval.issue_blocked: Invoice cannot be issued until the customer approves the work report.
approval.modal_hint: Manual override — customer approval normally happens via the email link.
approval.modal_desc_none: Reset — work report is not in the approval workflow.
approval.modal_desc_approved: Invoice will be automatically issued and sent to the client.
approval.modal_desc_rejected: Records the rejection reason. Invoice stays as draft.
approval.auto_send_failed: Approval succeeded but auto-sending the invoice failed: {error}

invoice.bulk_send_no_eligible: None of the selected invoices is in issued/sent/paid state.
invoice.bulk_mark_paid_no_eligible: None of the selected invoices is in issued/sent state.
invoice.bulk_issue_confirm:
Issue {n} drafts?

Each will get a variable symbol from the numbering template. The action is irreversible — drafts will be locked.
invoice.bulk_issue_no_eligible: None of the selected invoices is a draft.
invoice.search_placeholder: Search by var. symbol or client…
invoice.subtitle_grouping: Grouped by tax point (or issue date for proformas)
invoice.issue_final_confirm:
Issue the final tax document for paid proforma {varsymbol}?

A draft invoice will be created with items copied from the proforma and the advance payment deducted. You'll be redirected to the editor afterwards.
invoice.issue_final_failed: Failed to issue the final tax document

classification.title: Classification
classification.revenue_category_hint: Free-form tag for business mix analysis in CRM.

attachments.title: Email attachments
attachments.hint: These files are bundled with the invoice PDF when sending to the client (not with reminders). Max 10 MiB per file, 20 MiB total.

invoice.edit_issued_body: You are editing invoice {varsymbol} in status {status}. Changes will overwrite snapshots and may desynchronize the document with the client's records. The action is audited. For the client, we recommend issuing a credit note instead.
invoice.edit_issued_confirm:
⚠ WARNING — editing an ISSUED invoice

Invoice {varsymbol} has already been issued{sent}.

Editing will:
• change the content of a document the client may already have in their books
• overwrite JSON snapshots (immutability is broken)
• keep the original varsymbol (no new one is generated)
• be audited in ActivityLog

Recommended: issue a credit note instead. Continue to the editor anyway?
invoice.credit_note_warning: ⚠ Manual credit note — if it relates to a specific invoice, issue it via Cancel / credit note in that invoice's detail.

czk_recap.title: CZK conversion
czk_recap.fallback_note: rate from an earlier available day
czk_recap.warning_fallback: CNB had no rate for the issue date — used rate {rate} CZK/{currency} from {date}.
czk_recap.warning_last_known: CNB unavailable — used last known rate {rate} CZK/{currency} from {date}.

invoice.exchange_rate_hint: After the initial fetch from CNB the rate stays fixed. You can override it manually — the stored value is used in the PDF and exports.
invoice.bank_not_set: Bank account for {currency} is not configured in settings
invoice.wr_not_in_items_confirm:
Work report "{description}" has {hours}h for {amount} {ccy}, but is not listed as an invoice item.

Continue without transferring the work report to the invoice?
invoice.wr_hint: The work report prints on a second page of the invoice PDF. If filled, set the invoice item manually (e.g. "Extra work {title} — total {hours}h × {rate} {currency}").
invoice.proforma_no_tax_point: Proforma has no tax point. The tax document is issued after payment.
invoice.bulk_clone_confirm:
Clone {n} invoices to next month?

Item descriptions will shift (e.g. "3/2026" → "4/2026"). Drafts are created — none will be sent or issued automatically.
invoice.bulk_send_confirm:
Send {n} invoices to clients?

E-mail goes to the client's main address + project billing emails. If the client has no email, the invoice will be skipped.

modals.cancel_credit_desc: For the client — creates a draft with negative values, you'll review the editor and issue.
modals.cancel_internal_desc: For incorrectly issued invoices, the client doesn't receive any document.
modals.cancel_internal_desc_cn: For incorrectly issued credit notes, the client doesn't receive any document.
modals.cancel_delete_desc: Permanently removes the accounting record from the database, including cached PDF, archive of sent versions, and user attachments. Any linked cancellation/credit-note will be deleted TOGETHER. After confirmation you will see a detailed warning based on the current status (issued / sent / paid / cancelled). Recommended only as a last resort.
modals.cancel_delete_desc_cn: Permanently removes the credit note from the database, including cached PDF, archive of sent versions, and user attachments. Any linked cancellation document will be deleted TOGETHER. The original invoice is NOT affected — it stays in its current status. If it frees the last number in the credit-note sequence, that number is released. Recommended only as a last resort.
modals.send_default_hint: Default: client's main email + project's billing emails
modals.send_note_placeholder: Added to the email body above the invoice details. Each new line = new paragraph.
modals.send_note_hint: The note is added only to the email, NOT to the invoice PDF.
modals.reminder_body: Client will receive an email reminder with the invoice PDF. Status will change to "Reminded" and the reminder count will be incremented.

payment_method.label: Payment method
payment_method.hint: For card or cash payments the PDF and email omit the QR code and bank account.
payment_method.paid_by_card: Paid online by card — please do not pay again.

supplier.title: Suppliers
supplier.delete_confirm: Delete supplier? Only possible if no clients or invoices.
supplier.create_hint: After creation, default CZK + EUR currencies are auto-seeded. Fill in bank account info in Settings after switching to the new supplier.
supplier.ares_invalid_ic: Company ID must be exactly 8 digits.
supplier.ares_loaded_email_hint: ARES does not return e-mail — please fill it in manually below.

client.title: Clients
client.dual_role_tooltip: Customer and vendor — we both invoice and purchase
client.roles_hint: Client role — an entity can be both a customer (we invoice them) and a vendor (we buy from them).
client.roles_required: Pick at least one role (customer or vendor).
client.hourly_rate_hint: Used as fallback in the invoice editor when no project is selected. 0 = not used.
client.auto_send_reminders_hint: When off, the cron will not send automatic reminders for this client. Manual send (single + bulk) always works.
client.delete_warning:
Delete client "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

Only works if the client has no invoices or projects — otherwise use Archive.
client.dic_invalid: {dic} is invalid or does not exist
client.duplicate_ic: A client with this Reg. No. already exists:
client.duplicate_dic: A client with this VAT ID already exists:

project.title: Projects
project.info_create_in_client: New projects are created in the client's page — they are always tied to a specific client.
project.name: Name
project.delete_warning:
Delete project "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

Only works if the project has no invoices — otherwise use Archive.
project.requires_approval_hint: Invoice cannot be issued until the customer approves the work report via email. Once approved, the invoice is issued and sent automatically.

bank.title: Bank statements
bank.subtitle: Import GPC/ABO statements + auto-matching to invoices by VS.
bank.no_data: No statements. Upload the first GPC file using the button above.
bank.scan_done: Scan complete: found {scanned}, imported {imported}, duplicates {duplicate}, errors {errors}
bank.unmatch_confirm: Unmatch this transaction from the invoice? If the invoice was marked paid by this match, it will be reverted to "Issued".
bank.manual_match_hint_html: Enter the numeric invoice ID from the URL (e.g. /invoices/6).
bank.vs_hint: If the transaction has a VS, it's prefilled. You can edit it (e.g. when the client entered the wrong VS).
bank.import_duplicate: This statement has already been imported (statement #{id}).

stats.title: Charts & statistics
stats.subtitle: Revenue, clients and projects overview across periods.
stats.vat_payer_note: VAT payer — revenue is calculated excluding VAT.
stats.non_vat_payer_note: Non-VAT payer — revenue is calculated including VAT.
stats.rolling_12m_hint: Last 12 months (rolling). Relevant for the VAT threshold (CZK 2,000,000).
stats.rolling_12m_tooltip: Rolling last 12 months: {current}. Comparison: 12 months before that ({prev}).
stats.concentration_medium: ⚠ Elevated dependency on few clients — consider diversifying.
stats.concentration_high: ⚠ High risk — majority of revenue depends on few clients.
stats.cashflow_hint: Cumulative payments received (paid_at) this year vs. last year.
stats.forecast_hint: YTD this year + seasonality from previous year.
stats.forecast_tooltip: YTD this year: {ytd}. Predicted remainder = last year's remainder ({remainder}) × growth {growth} %.
stats.invoice_size_hint: {n} invoices · size converted to CZK equivalent
stats.cumulative_ytd_hint: This year vs. previous year up to the same day.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.receivables_hint: (what clients owe us — from issued invoices)
dashboard.yoy_ytd_tooltip: Comparison: current YTD vs. {year} at the same date ({ytd}). Full year {year}: {total}.
dashboard.cashflow_forecast_hint: From unpaid invoices with due date in the window.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Supplier details and bank accounts (admin only).
settings.commercial_register_placeholder: Spisová značka X 12345 vedená u Krajského soudu v Plzni
settings.commercial_register_hint: Centered in the footer of every invoice PDF.
settings.auto_send_reminders_hint: When off, the cron will not send automatic reminders for this supplier. Manual send (single + bulk) always works.
settings.auto_generate_recurring_hint: When off, the cron skips all recurring invoice templates for this supplier. Manual "Generate now" still works.
settings.embed_isdoc: Embed ISDOC XML in invoice PDFs
settings.embed_isdoc_hint: Machine-readable invoice data (ISDOC 6.0.2) is attached to the PDF. Czech accounting software (Pohoda, Money S3, …) extracts it automatically; Adobe Reader / Foxit show a paperclip icon below the variable symbol. Only applies to CZK invoices with an assigned variable symbol.
settings.branding_subtitle: Custom logo and colors in the header of outgoing emails AND on invoice PDFs. When disabled, e-mails use the default MyInvoice „M" branding and PDFs show the company name as text.
settings.branding_logo_hint: PNG / JPG / SVG (max 1 MiB, ideally under 200 KiB). For raster: ideal height 240 px (renders in email at 48 px on 5× retina). SVG: original is kept for PDF (vector = crisp at any zoom), e-mail uses the converted transparent PNG (Outlook/Gmail strip SVG).
settings.branding_accent_color_hint: Color of the „M" logo (if you have no custom logo) and of links in the email. Default #3B2D83 (MyInvoice purple).
settings.branding_save_hint: Toggle and color save automatically (color picker with 0.5 s debounce) — the preview on the right refreshes after each change. Logo uploads automatically. When branding is enabled, the same logo is used on invoice PDFs — when disabled, PDFs show the company name as text.
settings.currency_active_hint: Active (can be used for new invoices)
settings.numbering_hint_intro: Custom invoice number format — leave empty to use the global cfg.php template. Placeholders:
settings.invoice_number_format_hint: Template must contain a counter (C in curly braces).
settings.invoice_number_period_hint: When the counter resets back to 1.
settings.numbering_must_have_counter: Missing counter — add e.g. CCC in curly braces.
settings.tax_hint: Fields needed for XML report generation (DPHDP3, Kontrolní hlášení). Optional otherwise.
settings.vat_period_hint: VAT control statement is always monthly, even for quarterly VAT payers.
settings.financial_office_hint: e.g. 451 = Prague 1. Find on tax portal.
settings.sest_hint: Optional — if accountant/advisor prepares the report.
settings.pohoda_hint: Codes from Pohoda's enums (account, centre, activity, contract). Fill only if you want them auto-applied to all exported invoices. If empty, Pohoda will use its own defaults after import.
settings.add_account_prompt: New account name for {code} (e.g. „{code} — Fio Bank"):

vat_classifications.hint: MF ČR codes for VAT return (DPHDP3) and control statement (KH). Global seed is read-only; you can add custom codes for your tenant.
vat_classifications.label: Description
vat_classifications.global_readonly: Global codes are read-only — create your own variant.
vat_classifications.delete_confirm: Delete code "{code}"? If already used, will be archived instead.

expense_categories.hint: Expense categories for received invoices — used for breakdown in CRM dashboard.
expense_categories.empty: No categories. Create first and assign to received invoices for better cost insight.
expense_categories.label: Label
expense_categories.archived_due_to_usage: Category is in use — archived (hidden from pickers, history preserved).
expense_categories.delete_confirm: Delete category "{label}"? If already used, will be archived instead.

codebooks.title: Codebooks
codebooks.subtitle: Currencies + bank accounts, VAT rates, countries, units. Admin only.
codebooks.is_default_unit_hint: Default unit for a new invoice item
codebooks.is_default_account_hint: Default account for this currency (only one per code)

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Admin / Accountant / Read-only — admin role only.
users.name: Name
users.last_admin_alert: Cannot deactivate the last active admin. Promote another user to admin first.
users.last_admin_form: This is the last active admin — cannot remove admin role or deactivate. Promote another user first.
users.et_reset_confirm: Reset template to file default? Your custom edits will be lost.

activity_log.title: Activity log
activity_log.subtitle: Audit records of all actions (admin only).

cron_jobs.title: Scheduled jobs
cron_jobs.subtitle: What should run automatically and when it last ran. The app cannot read crontab / Task Scheduler directly — every cron script writes its own heartbeat, and if the last successful run is missing or too old, you'll see a warning.
cron_jobs.tooltip_overdue: Last successful run is older than {hours} h.
cron_jobs.tooltip_failing: The last run ended with an error.
cron_jobs.tooltip_never_ran: Script never ran — most likely it isn't scheduled in crontab / Task Scheduler.
cron_jobs.setup_hint: Cron setup: see {link} in the manual.
cron_jobs.all_ok: All scheduled jobs are running on time.
cron_jobs.run_now_confirm: Really run script {script} now? It will run in the background and the result will appear in the table when it finishes.
cron_jobs.run_now_started: Script {script} has been started in the background.

export.title: Issued invoices export
export.subtitle: Bulk export of issued invoices for a given month in various formats.
export.format_pdf_zip_hint: Each invoice as a PDF inside one ZIP — for accounting/archive.
export.format_pohoda_hint: XML data package for import into Stormware Pohoda.
export.format_isdoc_hint: Czech standard XML invoice (ISDOC 6.0.x), single or ZIP with multiple ISDOC.
export.format_fakturoid_hint: Push to Fakturoid.cz via API token (per-supplier).
export.by_tax_hint: Uses {field} (proformas without tax point fall back to {fallback})
export.hint: PDFs are refreshed before export if the cache is stale. Larger archives may take a few seconds.

reports.disclaimer_title: Generated XML is only a helper
reports.disclaimer_body: Before submitting to the MF ČR EPO portal, always verify with your accountant or tax advisor. Tested on limited dataset — the app does not guarantee regulatory correctness.

shv.title: Recapitulative statement (DPHSHV)
shv.subtitle: Monthly report of EU supplies of goods/services to VAT payers in other member states. Version 06.01. Submitted by VAT payers and identified persons.
shv.total_hint: Sum of bases in CZK (no VAT)
shv.no_data: No EU supplies in this month (no issued invoices with VAT classification 20/22 for EU clients with VAT ID).
shv.note: Recapitulative statement is submitted by VAT payers with at least 1 EU supply in the month. Identified persons (non-payers) submit when B2B EU services or goods purchases over the limit.

submissions.title: EPO XML submission archive
submissions.subtitle: History of all generated XML reports (DPH/KH/SH/DPFO/DPPO). Records serve for audit accountability — actual submission happens on the EPO portal of MFČR outside MyInvoice.
submissions.empty: No records yet. Download your first report and it will appear here.
submissions.delete_confirm: Delete archived record? This cannot be undone.

income_tax.title: Income tax (DPFO / DPPO)
income_tax.subtitle: Annual income tax return. **MVP foundation** — return is NOT complete.
income_tax.mvp_disclaimer_title: ⚠️ Only foundation — return is NOT complete
income_tax.mvp_disclaimer_body: This return contains only orientational numbers from the invoicing system and taxpayer identification. Real tax return requires accounting data (depreciation, wages, social and health insurance, advance payments, tax credits), which MyInvoice.cz does not track. Before submission ALWAYS supplement in cooperation with accountant/advisor or in accounting software.
income_tax.revenue_hint: From issued invoices (CZK) in the year
income_tax.missing_data_title: What XML does not contain (you must supplement):
income_tax.missing_zaloha: Tax advances paid during the year
income_tax.missing_advice: Recommendation: fill in accounting software or hand over to accountant/advisor.

kh.title: Control statement (DPHKH1)
kh.subtitle: Always monthly submission, even for quarterly VAT payers. Version 03.01.
kh.a4_label: Domestic supplies with VAT over 10 000 CZK
kh.a5_label: Domestic supplies with VAT up to 10 000 CZK (aggregated)
kh.b3_label: Received domestic supplies up to 10 000 CZK (aggregated)
kh.note_monthly: Control statement is submitted ALWAYS monthly, even for quarterly VAT payers (only VAT return can be quarterly).

dph.title: VAT return (DPHDP3)
dph.subtitle: VAT return for MF ČR EPO portal. Form version 03.01.
dph.no_output_lines: No issued invoices with VAT classification in this month.
dph.no_input_lines: No received invoices with VAT classification in this month.
dph.no_data_hint: For correct calculation, mark invoices with VAT classification code (field 'VAT classification' in row editor).

crm.title: CRM dashboard
crm.subtitle: Revenue, costs, profit, top clients and vendors.

late_risk.title: Late payment risk — clients
late_risk.no_data: Not enough data yet (clients need 2+ paid invoices)

crm.no_data_hint: After your first invoices/expenses, click Recompute.
crm.no_data_vendors: No received invoices — import in Purchases section.
crm.no_chart_data: No chart data for this period.
crm.recompute_hint: Refresh pre-aggregated monthly summary (sp_recompute) — picks up latest invoices.

concentration.title: Concentration risk
concentration.risk_high: ⚠ High concentration — risky if one client leaves

expense_breakdown.title: Expenses by category
expense_breakdown.empty: No received invoices in this period.
expense_breakdown.uncategorized_hint: Assign expense categories in the received invoice editor — you'll see detailed breakdown.

integrations.title: External integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external services — iDoklad, Fakturoid, Anthropic AI. BYOK (bring your own key), encrypted at-rest.

idoklad.credentials_hint: OAuth2 client_credentials from your iDoklad account. Get → Settings → API → Applications.
idoklad.secret_hint: Encrypted AES-256-GCM with app.pepper, never returned back.
idoklad.delete_confirm: Remove iDoklad credentials? Running imports won't be cancelled, but future imports won't work.
idoklad.how_to_get: How to get client_id and client_secret
idoklad.step1: Sign in to your iDoklad account (app.idoklad.cz)
idoklad.step4: Copy client_id + client_secret and paste here
idoklad.run_hint: Import runs in background. Status polled every 2 seconds. Can be cancelled.
idoklad.incremental_hint: Filter DateLastChange ≥ bookmark — speeds up re-import (skips old unchanged).
idoklad.download_attachments_hint: Issued: rendered PDF from iDoklad. Received: first PDF attachment from vendor.
idoklad.cancel_confirm: Really cancel the running import? Already imported records will stay.
idoklad.cancel_requested: Cancel requested — worker will finish current item and exit

fakturoid.credentials_hint: BasicAuth: slug + email + personal API token. Find in Fakturoid → Settings → User profile → API.
fakturoid.key_hint: Encrypted AES-256-GCM. User-Agent header sent automatically.

ai.credentials_hint: BYOK — create your own API key at console.anthropic.com and paste it here. AI extracts data from PDF invoices without ISDOC.
ai.api_key_hint: Find at console.anthropic.com → Settings → API Keys. Starts with sk-ant-…
ai.extract_hint: ISDOC priority — if PDF has embed, use parser. Otherwise Claude vision. Synchronous (10-30s).
ai.drop_pdf: Click or drop PDF (1 or more)
ai.batch_serial_hint: Files processed sequentially (Anthropic API rate limit). One at a time.

imports.subtitle_unified: Import both issued and received invoices in one place.
imports.purchase_upload_title: Upload PDF / ISDOC for received invoice
imports.purchase_upload_hint: Drag files (PDF with embedded ISDOC, .isdoc, ZIP) — system verifies you're the customer in ISDOC, creates a draft received invoice + auto-resolves vendor via ARES.
imports.purchase_scan_hint: Drop vendor PDF/ISDOC invoices into the configured directory (cfg.php → purchase_invoice.inbox_dir) and trigger scan. System dedups via SHA-256, automatically creates drafts from ISDOC.
imports.ai_active_hint: PDFs without embedded ISDOC will be automatically processed by AI (Anthropic Claude vision).
imports.ai_not_configured_hint: PDFs without embedded ISDOC will be skipped. To auto-process vendor PDFs, configure Anthropic API key in
imports.purchase_scan_path_hint: Path is configured in cfg.php. Recommended: C:/inetpub/wwwroot/myinvoice.cz/inbox (inside webroot, IIS user has read access).
imports.purchase_manual_hint: Upload single invoice directly in the received invoice editor (drag & drop above form):
imports.title: Imports
imports.subtitle: Load issued invoices from Pohoda XML, ISDOC or PDF (PDF/A-3 with embedded ISDOC) into the system.
imports.supplier_required_hint: Invoices are imported only when the supplier reg. no. (IČO) in the file matches the supplier currently selected in the app. Files for a different supplier are skipped.
imports.status_rule_hint: If the due date is more than 30 days old (we assume it's already paid), the invoice is stored as Paid. Otherwise as Issued — payment is then matched via the standard bank-statement flow or manually.
imports.drop_or_click: Drop files here or click to choose
imports.formats_hint: Supported formats: .xml (Pohoda dataPack), .isdoc, .pdf (PDF/A-3 with embedded ISDOC — e.g. from iDoklad, Fakturoid, Superfaktura, MyInvoice), or .zip bundling any number of these files.
imports.hint: Clients are created automatically (preferring ARES lookup by Czech reg. no.). A project is created when the invoice has a project number or when the client has multiple emails across the batch. Duplicate invoices (by variable symbol) are skipped.

setup.title: Initial setup
setup.sample_hint: 5 clients, 8 projects, 20 invoices and 4 credit notes from the last 2 months. For trying out the app. Can be wiped later via admin/reset.
setup.sample_done: Generated: {clients} clients, {projects} projects, {invoices} invoices, {credit_notes} credit notes.
setup.require_totp_label: Require two-factor authentication (2FA) for all users
setup.require_totp_hint: After login, every user will be redirected to TOTP setup until they activate 2FA. You can change this later in cfg.local.php (auth.require_totp).
